unmapped.human_action: Review equity exposure to photonic computing (LITE, COHR) ahead of next OCS backlog disclosure or NVIDIA commitment burn-rate update; evaluate PLTR calls as the available options expression for the defense-AI Anduril catalyst clock; treat nuclear-SMR (OKLO, SMR) as a narrative-loud setup where options are expensive — position around discrete catalysts (HALEU program timing, next hyperscaler PPA announcement) rather than as directional trend-following premium.
unmapped.legal_disclaimer: Candidate draft for operator review only. Not financial advice. All positions referenced are paper-traded. Past scanner results do not imply future performance.
unmapped.machine_action: Reprice photonic-computing theme status from 'emerging' to 'growing' in scanner given confirmed revenue inflection and anchor investment; populate LITE and COHR in scanner contract universe for next scan cycle; flag PLTR as primary options expression for defense-AI sector; monitor NVIDIA commitment burn-rate disclosures across LITE and COHR earnings filings as primary falsification trigger; add AAOI to scanner watchlist given May 11 single-session +24% rotation signal.
unmapped.methodology_footer: Corpus claims sourced from trend-corpus vendor IR, regulatory, and clinical filings as of May 15-17, 2026. Scanner results dated April 28, 2026 UTC. Convergence scores reflect LLM-weighted cross-model ticker agreement as of scan date. Book data as of May 27, 2026.
unmapped.position_conflict_disclosure: No current book positions in photonic computing, defense AI, or nuclear SMR. Open book exposure is entirely in cicadas/ENSO agricultural theme (FXA x5 contracts, CORN x5, DBA x5, WEAT x3) ahead of June 11 ENSO data release; those positions are mostly underwater (-27% to -72%) and unrelated to this brief's sectors.
unmapped.uncertainty: Primary structural uncertainty is customer concentration: one anchor (NVIDIA) is doing most of the revaluation work in photonic computing. Private chiplet milestones from Lightmatter and Ayar are sourced from fundraise disclosures rather than audited accounts; treat as directional confirmation, not precise commercial validation. Scanner absence of LITE/COHR contracts may partly reflect genuine liquidity constraints in those names rather than pure under-pricing — confirm available strike and expiry universe before treating absence as mispricing signal.

original_issue.falsification: NVIDIA, Lumentum, or Coherent publicly reduces or restructures the March 2, 2026 $4B commitment in a newsroom release, 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call disclosure — this is the single biggest load-bearing support for the photonic revaluation. LITE or COHR misses guidance on hyperscaler optical revenue or OCS backlog conversion by more than 25% in any subsequent quarter, eliminating the revenue-inflection case. A non-photonic interconnect alternative (advanced copper, in-package electrical fabric, or hyperscaler-internal optical engines) wins material design-in slots away from LITE or COHR at OFC 2027 or an equivalent industry disclosure event. Anduril postpones an IPO or primary financing event past end-2026 with no replacement private valuation mark, breaking the defense-AI private-mark catalyst clock the public adjacents revalue against. Hyperscaler nuclear PPA flow falls below 1 GW of newly announced contracted or development-stage capacity for two consecutive quarters, removing demand-visibility anchor for OKLO and SMR.

Scanner absence of LITE/COHR contracts may partly reflect genuine liquidity constraints in those names rather than pure under-pricing — confirm available strike and expiry universe before treating absence as mispricing signal.

title: Revenue Is Moving in the Dark
summary: Photonic computing has crossed a confirmed revenue inflection — Lumentum +90% YoY, Coherent +21% YoY, NVIDIA $4B structural anchor — while the scanner records zero options contracts on both primary names and the convergence scorer still classifies the theme as emerging; the same AI-capex supercycle is visible in nuclear-SMR and defense-AI, but options premiums in those sectors have already partially taxed the expression.

claims.statement: Photonic computing has crossed a confirmed revenue inflection — Lumentum +90% YoY, Coherent +21% YoY, NVIDIA $4B structural anchor — while the scanner records zero options contracts on both primary names and the convergence scorer still classifies the theme as emerging; the same AI-capex supercycle is visible in nuclear-SMR and defense-AI, but options premiums in those sectors have already partially taxed the expression.
claims.falsification: NVIDIA, Lumentum, or Coherent publicly reduces or restructures the March 2, 2026 $4B commitment in a newsroom release, 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call disclosure — this is the single biggest load-bearing support for the photonic revaluation. LITE or COHR misses guidance on hyperscaler optical revenue or OCS backlog conversion by more than 25% in any subsequent quarter, eliminating the revenue-inflection case. A non-photonic interconnect alternative (advanced copper, in-package electrical fabric, or hyperscaler-internal optical engines) wins material design-in slots away from LITE or COHR at OFC 2027 or an equivalent industry disclosure event. Anduril postpones an IPO or primary financing event past end-2026 with no replacement private valuation mark, breaking the defense-AI private-mark catalyst clock the public adjacents revalue against. Hyperscaler nuclear PPA flow falls below 1 GW of newly announced contracted or development-stage capacity for two consecutive quarters, removing demand-visibility anchor for OKLO and SMR.

render.body: Revenue Is Moving in the Dark

render.heading: Thesis
render.body: Photonic computing has crossed a confirmed revenue inflection — Lumentum +90% YoY, Coherent +21% YoY, NVIDIA $4B structural anchor — while the scanner records zero options contracts on both primary names and the convergence scorer still classifies the theme as emerging; the same AI-capex supercycle is visible in nuclear-SMR and defense-AI, but options premiums in those sectors have already partially taxed the expression.

render.heading: Signals
render.body:
sig_lite_cohr_revenue_inflection: Lumentum fiscal Q3 2026 revenue $808.4M (+90% YoY); Coherent fiscal Q3 2026 revenue $1.806B (+21% YoY); both consistent with AI-datacenter pacing rather than legacy telecom pacing. Lumentum Q2 OCS backlog baseline exceeded $400M. (sector: photonic-computing; quality: high)

sig_nvidia_4b_anchor: NVIDIA March 2, 2026 $4B strategic commitment split equally between Lumentum and Coherent: investment capital, multibillion-dollar purchase commitments, future capacity and access rights, U.S. manufacturing support. Structural, not indicative. (sector: photonic-computing; quality: high)

sig_private_chiplet_validation: Lightmatter $850M total raised at $4.4B valuation, Passage L200/L200x above 200 Tbps; Ayar Labs $870M total raised after March 2026 $500M Series E, HVM target 2028; Marvell-Celestial AI closed February 2026, revenue guide beginning H2 FY2028 toward $1B annualized run rate Q4 FY2029. (sector: photonic-computing; quality: medium)

sig_scanner_absence_lite_cohr: Scanner returns zero options contracts for LITE and COHR. Convergence score 0.4 (MEDIUM, emerging) — below the threshold where retail attention drives options premium. Theme status inconsistent with reported revenue trajectory. (sector: photonic-computing; quality: high)

sig_pltr_defense_asymmetry: PLTR scanner asymmetry 5.36 on $170 June 20 call; convergence 0.6; growing status. 60% IV. Anduril private-mark clock running — each fundraise or program-of-record win sets the public-adjacent revaluation cadence with 1-2 quarter lag. (sector: defense-ai; quality: high)

sig_nuclear_smr_scanner: OKLO scanner asymmetry 2.54-3.41 across June expiries; SMR asymmetry 2.74-3.15; IV above 100% on both. Confirmed hyperscaler PPAs: Microsoft-Constellation, Google-Kairos Power, Amazon-X-energy. Options have partially priced the narrative. (sector: nuclear-smr; quality: high)

render.heading: What would falsify it
render.body: NVIDIA, Lumentum, or Coherent publicly reduces or restructures the March 2, 2026 $4B commitment in a newsroom release, 8-K, 10-Q, or earnings-call disclosure — this is the single biggest load-bearing support for the photonic revaluation. LITE or COHR misses guidance on hyperscaler optical revenue or OCS backlog conversion by more than 25% in any subsequent quarter, eliminating the revenue-inflection case. A non-photonic interconnect alternative (advanced copper, in-package electrical fabric, or hyperscaler-internal optical engines) wins material design-in slots away from LITE or COHR at OFC 2027 or an equivalent industry disclosure event. Anduril postpones an IPO or primary financing event past end-2026 with no replacement private valuation mark, breaking the defense-AI private-mark catalyst clock the public adjacents revalue against. Hyperscaler nuclear PPA flow falls below 1 GW of newly announced contracted or development-stage capacity for two consecutive quarters, removing demand-visibility anchor for OKLO and SMR.
